title: Briful 4PCS Christmas Square Gift Boxes with Lids, Christmas Boxes for Presents, Present Boxes Xmas Small Gift Box Set for Crafts, Chocolate, Kids Toys, Christmas Decorations
features: 【Premium Christmas Gift Boxes】All of gift boxes with lids for presents are made of strong cardboard. The smaller square boxes can be nested inside the largest boxes to save space when not in use. Besides, there is no needs to assemble them yourself, pretty convenient for novice.

【Attractive Gift Box Set】With a minimalist design, various colours and gender-neutral colour options, our decorative hat boxes for flowers can be the eye-catcher for your living room, workplace or bedroom.

【Hat Boxes for Gift】Suitable for storing accessories, crafts, buttons, wedding gifts, hat, etc. Popular for holiday, wedding, or Christmas gifts. You can also customize these sweets gift box by painting on it or using decoupage paper.
【Christmas Boxes for Presents】Showcase and presents your gift in a stylish and surprise way, makes for a personalised present boxes for her, for him, or for a family member, friend, or colleague.
【Gift Boxes Different Sizes】Pack with 4 different sizes of nested gift boxes, Small - 3.5*3.5*2 inches, Medium – 4.5 *4.5*3 inches, Large – 5.5*5.5*3.5 inches, The biggest – 5.9*5.9*4 inches.
description: Made with Hard Cardboard The box is made up of hard cardboard, hence it is strong and sturdy. It prevents the damage of the gift inside the box. The box can take any amount of frequent use because of its durability. Beautiful Minimalist Design Boxes are not just for storage purposes; you may also use them as decorative pieces for your home or office. With a wide variety of designs to choose from, there is a storage box that will tickle your fancy and make an excellent finishing touch to your living space. No Assembly Required The smaller present boxes can be nested inside the largest gift boxes to save space when not in use, our cardboard gift boxes have more than enough space to hold diverse stuff.
